text:
- Drafted a blog post
- Used an LLM to meticulously improve the argument over 4 hours.
- Wow, feeling great, it’s so convincing!
- Fun idea let’s ask it to argue the opposite. 
- LLM demolishes the entire argument and convinces me that the opposite is in fact true.
- lol

🚨 BREAKING: Claude has a secret mode called "Donella Meadows Leverage Point Deconstructor."

It maps any complex problem as interconnected feedback loops, finds the single point where a tiny change produces massive results, and rebuilds your entire strategy from the structure https://t.co/yj49HQMmST

Donella Meadows spent decades studying why billion-dollar policies fail and tiny interventions succeed.

I turned her entire framework into one prompt 👇

The user

1/ Run the full prompt in ChatGPT, Claude, or Grok. 

2/ Answer the 4 discovery questions in Phase 1. 

3/ Type "continue" after each phase to go deeper.

Works for startup strategy, org culture problems, market positioning, supply chain breakdowns, product-market fit, team
